name: frontend-interview-dashboard
description: Local Angular 20 + Express interview tool. See docs/superpowers/specs/.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix api && npm install --prefix web
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm start --prefix api" "npm start --prefix web"
scripts.test: npm test --prefix api && npm test --prefix web
scripts.reset: git checkout -- web/src/app/features/dashboard/ && git clean -fd web/src/app/features/dashboard/
